native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing
AlphaFold, ESMFold, RoseTTAFold, or other structure models before sealing

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: ENGRAILED HOMEODOMAIN Q50A VARIANT DNA COMPLEX. Entity description: ENGRAILED HOMEODOMAIN. Organism: Drosophila melanogaster. Polymer composition: protein/NA. V71 shard: V71A_BROAD_RCSB_NONREDUNDANT. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_complex_not_assembly_required. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V71 E66 metadata context marks: generic_complex_only membrane_context_strong topology_evidence transmembrane_context. Known E66 words are allowed; candidate E67 labels are withheld from prediction. generic complex alone is not assembly_required_core. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public metadata indicates explicit transmembrane/topology-provider context
generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence

v71_context_policy.context_derivation: V71 E66 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. E66-known words are allowed; candidate E67 words are withheld from prediction context so V71 can discover them.
reasons: public metadata indicates explicit transmembrane/topology-provider context
